calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. TED JANOWSKY OF THE VLSP CHANGING LIVES, TEL. NO. 865-9209 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT KIM DICKERSON;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT KIM DICKERSON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 473 IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL FILE HER PROPOSED ANSWER BY OCTOBER 29, 2009. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
